Part.Source:
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
Do 'LoadGridState'
&Title = "Duplicatas a Pagar"
Header if &Context.EmpCod.IsEmpty() LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Endif
for Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &AppName = FilFan &Phone = FilFonNum &Mail = FilEml &Website = FilSit &AddressLine1 = FilLogNro &AddressLine2 = FilBai &AddressLine3 = FilCidNom +', '+ FilCidUfeCod Print printTitle EndFor
End
//Footer // &PageInfo = "Page: " + &Page.ToString().Trim() // &DateInfo = "Date: " + &Today.ToFormattedString() // Print printFooter //End
Do 'PrintFilters'
Do 'PrintColumnTitles'
Do 'PrintData'
Do 'PrintFooter'
Sub 'PrintFilters'
If not &CreCliCod.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreCliCod EndIf If not &CreCliRaz.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreCliRaz EndIf If not &CreAbvDup.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreAbvDup EndIf If not &CreDupIsAce.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreDupIsAce EndIf If not &CreFilPgt.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreFilPgt EndIf If not &CreRecPag.IsEmpty() &FilterCreRecPagValueDescription = &CreRecPag.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterCreRecPag EndIf If not &CreSts.IsEmpty() &FilterCreStsValueDescription = &CreSts.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterCreSts EndIf If not &CreVlrSdo.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreVlrSdo EndIf If not &CreDtaVct.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreDtaVct EndIf If not &CreDtaVct_To.IsEmpty() &CreDtaVct_To_Description = format('%1 (%2)', "Vct.", "à") print printBlockFilterCreDtaVct_To EndIf If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreDupNro1.IsEmpty() &CreDupNro = &CreDupNro1 print printBlockFilterCreDupNro EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreCbrNom1.IsEmpty() &CreCbrNom = &CreCbrNom1 print printBlockFilterCreCbrNom EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CreVlrDup1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreVlrDup1.IsEmpty() &CreVlrDup = &CreVlrDup1 print printBlockFilterCreVlrDup EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreDupNro2.IsEmpty() &CreDupNro = &CreDupNro2 print printBlockFilterCreDupNro EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreCbrNom2.IsEmpty() &CreCbrNom = &CreCbrNom2 print printBlockFilterCreCbrNom EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVLRDUP' &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CreVlrDup2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreVlrDup2.IsEmpty() &CreVlrDup = &CreVlrDup2 print printBlockFilterCreVlrDup EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 3 &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreDupNro3.IsEmpty() &CreDupNro = &CreDupNro3 print printBlockFilterCreDupNro EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreCbrNom3.IsEmpty() &CreCbrNom = &CreCbrNom3 print printBlockFilterCreCbrNom EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVLRDUP' &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CreVlrDup3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreVlrDup3.IsEmpty() &CreVlrDup = &CreVlrDup3 print printBlockFilterCreVlrDup EndIf EndCase EndIf EndIf EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'PrintColumnTitles'
print printBlockBeforeGrid print printBlockLines_titles
EndSub
Sub 'PrintData' &TotalSaldo.SetEmpty() For each order EmpCod FilCod CreRecPag CreDtaVct when &OrderedBy = 1 order EmpCod FilCod CreRecPag (CreDtaVct) when &OrderedBy = 2 order EmpCod CreRecPag CreVlrSdo FilCod CreDupNro when &OrderedBy = 3
using DSwwDuplicataPagar(&CreCliCod, &CreCliRaz, &CreAbvDup, &CreDupIsAce, &CreFilPgt, &CreRecPag, &CreSts, &CreVlrSdo,&CreDtaVct, &CreDtaVct_To, &DynamicFiltersSelector1, &DynamicFiltersOperator1, &CreDupNro1, &CreCbrNom1,&CreVlrDup1, &CrePedNum1, &DynamicFiltersEnabled2, &DynamicFiltersSelector2, &DynamicFiltersOperator2, &CreDupNro2, &CreCbrNom2, &CreVlrDup2, &CrePedNum2, &DynamicFiltersEnabled3, &DynamicFiltersSelector3, &DynamicFiltersOperator3, &CreDupNro3, &CreCbrNom3, &CreVlrDup3, &CrePedNum3) if CreNovCliRaz_Formula.Length() > 30 &CreNovCliRaz = substr(CreNovCliRaz_Formula, 1, 30) + '...' Else &CreNovCliRaz = CreNovCliRaz_Formula EndIf &AuxPedido = CreAbvDup &TotalSaldo += CreVlrSdo Do 'BeforePrintLine' print printBlockLines_data Do 'AfterPrintLine' EndFor print Total EndSub
Sub 'LoadGridState'
If &Session.Get(!"wwDuplicataPagarGridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(!"wwDuplicataPagarGridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(!"wwDuplicataPagarGridState")) Endif
&OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy
For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECLICOD" &CreCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECLIRAZ" &CreCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREABVDUP" &CreAbvDup.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREDUPISACE" &CreDupIsAce.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREFILPGT" &CreFilPgt.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRERECPAG" &CreRecPag.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRESTS" &CreSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREVLRSDO" &CreVlrSdo.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREDTAVCT" &CreDtaVct.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &CreDtaVct_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'BeforePrintLine'
EndSub
Sub 'AfterPrintLine'
EndSub
Sub 'PrintFooter'
EndSub
